summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Analytics (G-YFJ0E82MK6) and Meta Pixel (965442971770619) integration on Decorous construction website. All analytics scripts load correctly, tracking functions are available, and conversion events are properly triggered for lead submissions, cost calculations, and WhatsApp interactions.

minor_issues.issue: GA requests are being aborted in testing environment (ERR_ABORTED)
minor_issues.impact: Analytics data may not reach Google servers in testing environment, but tracking calls are being made correctly
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior in headless testing environments and does not indicate a real issue

passed_tests: Google Analytics (gtag) script loads and function is available
Meta Pixel (fbq) script loads and function is available
Google Analytics ID G-YFJ0E82MK6 properly configured in dataLayer
Lead form submission triggers both GA and Meta analytics events
Cost calculator triggers analytics events with detailed parameters when calculation completes
WhatsApp floating button click triggers contact tracking events
Homepage renders correctly with all analytics scripts loaded
Meta tags for SEO and social sharing are properly configured
Analytics utility functions work correctly for custom event tracking
Cost calculator backend integration works and returns results
Calculator lead form integration works with analytics tracking
